# Events ledger

## E-001: Fire at the Venetian mint
- date: 1521-12-03
- location: Zecca, Venice
- present: [Master Giraldo, two apprentices]
- canonical: Master Giraldo set the fire to destroy the ledgers proving his
  fraud. The wind was from the south. The ledger room burned hottest. Two
  apprentices escaped via the south window.
- rendered_in:
    tiny-inquisitor/ch_01: Tommaso's POV, investigates the ashes the morning
      after and finds a scrap of an outbound ledger.
- book_constraints: Tommaso cannot yet know who lit the fire.
